entities.name: PHYTOTOXINS
entities.description: Low molecular weight metabolites produced by plant pathogens that cause damage to plant tissues and are involved in plant disease

entities.name: PLANT PATHOGENS
entities.description: Organisms that cause disease in plants

entities.name: PLANT DISEASE
entities.description: Abnormal condition of a plant caused by pathogens

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen that produces various phytotoxins

entities.name: FUSARIC ACID
entities.description: A phytotoxin produced by F. oxysporum f. sp. cubense

entities.name: BANANA
entities.description: Host plant for F. oxysporum f. sp. cubense

entities.name: F. OXYSPORUM F. SP. CUBENSE
entities.description: A specific forma specialis of Fusarium oxysporum that infects banana

entities.name: BEAUVERICIN
entities.description: A phytotoxin produced by F. oxysporum f. sp. melonis

entities.name: MUSKMELON
entities.description: Host plant for F. oxysporum f. sp. melonis

entities.name: F. OXYSPORUM F. SP. MELONIS
entities.description: A specific forma specialis of Fusarium oxysporum that infects muskmelon

entities.name: BIKAVERIN
entities.description: A phytotoxin produced by F. oxysporum f. sp. vasinfectum

entities.name: NORBIKAVERIN
entities.description: A phytotoxin produced by F. oxysporum f. sp. vasinfectum

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: Host plant for F. oxysporum f. sp. vasinfectum

entities.name: F. OXYSPORUM F. SP. VASINFECTUM
entities.description: A specific forma specialis of Fusarium oxysporum that infects cotton

entities.name: WILT SYMPTOMS
entities.description: Visible signs of plant wilting caused by phytotoxins

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A serious disease of chickpea caused by Fusarium sp.

entities.name: FUSARIUM SP.
entities.description: Fungal species responsible for causing Fusarium wilt in chickpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Legume crop affected by Fusarium wilt

entities.name: CHLOROSIS
entities.description: Yellowing of plant tissue, a common symptom of Fusarium infection in chickpea

entities.name: WILTING
entities.description: Loss of rigidity in plant tissues, a common symptom of Fusarium infection in chickpea

entities.name: FUSARIUM ACUTATUM
entities.description: Fungal species whose culture filtrates cause permanent wilting in chickpea

entities.name: BIOASSAY
entities.description: A method used to test the effect of culture filtrates on chickpea cuttings

entities.name: 8-O-METHYL-FUSARUBIN
entities.description: A phytotoxin identified from the culture filtrate of Fusarium acutatum

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding approach used to obtain disease-resistant crops

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding approach using molecular tools to obtain disease-resistant crops

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to resist plant diseases
